description_long: This object consists of three wooden storage crates, two stacked vertically and one adjacent, forming a stable arrangement. The crates are constructed from light-colored, horizontally planked wood with reinforced square frames at the edges. On one visible side, the crates display black stenciled shipping symbols, including an umbrella (indicating protection from moisture), a wine glass (fragile), and arrows (this side up). The surfaces are matte and slightly textured, with visible wood grain and minor imperfections, giving a rustic, utilitarian appearance. The tops of the crates are flat and bordered by raised wooden frames, suggesting they can be stacked securely. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, and the crates appear to be closed with removable flat lids.
description: A set of three light wooden storage crates with stenciled shipping symbols, flat tops, and reinforced frames. The crates have a rustic, utilitarian look and are stackable.
description_view_0: Two wooden crates are stacked vertically, showing plain wood panels and reinforced frames with no visible markings.
description_view_1: Three crates are arranged in a pyramid, with the front faces displaying black shipping symbols: arrows, umbrella, and wine glass.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the stacked crates, showing plain wood panels and frames without any visible symbols or markings.
description_view_3: Three crates are arranged in a pyramid, with all visible faces showing plain wood panels and no symbols.
